testcase.name: test_waitlist_signup_new_email

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected 200, got 502: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_waitlist_automation.py:32: in test_waitlist_signup_new_email assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 502: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_waitlist_signup_duplicate_email
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_waitlist_automation.py:67: in test_waitlist_signup_duplicate_email assert response2.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response2.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 502 E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 422 for invalid email, got 502 assert 502 == 422 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_login_works

failure.message:
AssertionError: Login failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_waitlist_automation.py:367: in test_login_works assert response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
